dst.description: The Media Access Control (MAC) address of the receiver.

src.description: The Media Access Control (MAC) address of the sender.

type.description: Identifies the protocol encapsulated in the payload (e.g., IPv4 is 0x0800).

version.description: Indicates the version of the IP protocol (e.g., 4 for IPv4).

ihl.description: Internet Header Length. The number of 32-bit words in the header.

ttl.description: Limits the lifespan of the packet to prevent infinite looping.

sport.description: The port number of the sending process.

dport.description: The port number of the receiving process.
